response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 15+ years of full-stack development experience across diverse stacks, but the resume shows no formal people-management or team-leadership tenure, no developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure focus area at scale, and no mobile-platform ecosystem work. The role explicitly requires 2+ years of people management and 3+ years building developer tools as a primary focus, neither of which is demonstrated. Workshops and an open-source project show mentorship instincts, but that does not substitute for managing engineers or owning a productivity-tooling roadmap.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Demonstrated craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshop experience signaling mentorship aptitude
Some adjacent tooling work — GitLab/CI setup at Altom, MCP code generators at re:cinq, custom test runner (Trial) in D
concerns: No formal people-management or team-lead title in any role — fails the 2-year management minimum
Developer-tools/build-systems/test-infra is not the primary focus of any listed position
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience (iOS/Android tooling at scale); brief iOS/Apple TV work in 2015 is dated and product-level, not platform-level

key_factors.factor: Developer tools not a primary career focus
Long tenure and broad engineering depth
